metaDescription: MiniMax M2 (MiniMax), released 2025-10-27 — part of the MiniMax M-Series line. Open-source (MIT) 230B-total / 10B-active MoE for coding and agentic tool callin…
overview: MiniMax M2 is a large language model from MiniMax, part of the MiniMax M-Series line. Released 2025-10-27. MiniMax's flagship MoE LLM line built for coding and agentic/tool-use workflows, shipped as fast point releases.
What's notable in this version: Open-source (MIT) 230B-total / 10B-active MoE for coding and agentic tool calling; 69.4 SWE-bench Verified; ~8% of Claude Sonnet price.
